summary.lv: SSI Schaefer meklē Operational Technology Security vadītāju, kas pārvaldīs OT/ICS drošību intralogistikas iekārtu un risinājumu portfelī globāli.
summary.en: SSI Schaefer is hiring an Operational Technology Security Manager to own OT/ICS security across the intralogistics equipment and solutions portfolio globally.
